data.name: A11y_Btn_Minus_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the minus button in numeric input dialogs.

data.name: A11y_Btn_Plus_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the plus button in numeric input dialogs.

data.name: Btn_Minus
data.comment: Display text for the minus button.

data.name: Btn_Plus
data.comment: Display text for the plus button.

data.name: A11y_State_Focused
data.comment: Appended to AccessibleDescription when a button gains focus.

data.name: A11y_State_Hover
data.comment: State text appended to the accessibility description when the control is hovered.

data.name: A11y_State_Pressed
data.comment: State text appended to the accessibility description when the button is physically pressed (MouseDown). Distinct from Focused to help AT users distinguish between keyboard focus and physical press.

data.name: A11y_BtnCopyDesc
data.value: Copies the text from the input box to the clipboard.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the copy button, explaining its function.

data.name: A11y_BtnCopyName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the copy button.

data.name: A11y_Cannot_Delete
data.comment: Accessibility message played when backspace is pressed at the start of the text.

data.name: A11y_Capture_Cancelled
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the user cancels the hotkey capture process.

data.name: A11y_Capture_Esc_Cancel
data.comment: Accessibility message informing users that they can press ESC to cancel capture.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Char
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a single character is deleted. {0} is the deleted character.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Char_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe version of character deletion accessibility message.

data.name: A11y_CurrentValue
data.comment: Accessibility message showing the current value in settings dialogs. {0} is the current value.

data.name: A11y_Hotkey_Captured
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a new hotkey is successfully captured. {0} is the resulting hotkey string.

data.name: A11y_MainFormDesc
data.value: Press {0} to copy text and return, or open the keyboard when the input is empty. Press Start or Menu to open the keyboard at any time. Use {1} to backspace and the D-pad to move the cursor or browse history. Tap or hold LB or RB to page through history in steps of five; keep holding to continue paging, or hold either shoulder with Left/Right to jump by word. Use LT and RT to jump to the text start or end, and press LT + RT together to toggle Privacy Mode. In the Phrases submenu, use LB and RB to switch pages and LT and RT to jump to the first or last page. In the Phrase Manager, use LB and RB to select the previous or next phrase, and LT and RT to jump to the first or last phrase. Release Back or View to return. Press LB + RB + {2} for quick return. Hold LB + RB + {3} for 0.8 seconds to exit. Keyboard: Enter to copy or open the keyboard, Esc to clear, Up/Down for history, Alt + B to return.
data.comment: Detailed accessibility description for the main window, explaining various controller and keyboard operations. {0} is confirm, {1} is delete, {2} is cancel, and {3} is delete for the exit shortcut.

data.name: A11y_Returning
data.comment: Accessibility message played when an action is completed and focus is about to return to the previous window.

data.name: A11y_MainFormName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the main window.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Bottom
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the cursor reaches the end of the text.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Newest
data.comment: Accessibility message played when navigating history back to the newest input.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Oldest
data.comment: Accessibility message played when navigating history to the oldest item with no more records.

data.name: A11y_Nav_Top
data.comment: Accessibility message played when the cursor reaches the beginning of the text.

data.name: A11y_Selected_Text
data.comment: Announces the currently selected text content

data.name: A11y_Selected_Text_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe version of text selection message.

data.name: A11y_Cursor_Move
data.comment: Announces the current absolute cursor position.

data.name: A11y_Cursor_Move_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe version of cursor movement accessibility message.

data.name: A11y_No_Text_To_Copy
data.comment: Accessibility message played when attempting to copy empty text.

data.name: A11y_TBInputDesc
data.value: Enter the text you want to copy to the clipboard here.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the input field, guiding users to enter content.

data.name: A11y_TBInputName
data.comment: Accessibility name label for the input field.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Main
data.comment: Accessibility label for the main layout container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Main_Desc
data.value: Container holding the text input and action buttons.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the main layout container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Input
data.comment: Accessibility label for the input area container.

data.name: A11y_Layout_Input_Desc
data.value: Container housing the text input field.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the input area container.

data.name: App_Title
data.comment: Application name used in window titles and message dialogs.

data.name: App_GamepadLayout_Suffix
data.comment: Short title-bar suffix showing the currently active face-button layout. {0} is the layout name.

data.name: App_GamepadLayout_Auto_Suffix
data.comment: Short title-bar suffix showing that Auto mode resolved to a specific effective face-button layout. {0} is the Auto label and {1} is the effective layout name.

data.name: Btn_CopyDefault
data.comment: Default display text for the copy button.

data.name: Err_ConfigInvalid
data.value: The configuration file format is invalid. The application will start with default settings.
data.comment: Error message displayed when the config file is corrupted or formatted incorrectly.

data.name: Err_HotkeyRegFail
data.value:
Global hotkey {0} failed to register.
Make sure that multiple instances of this application are not running at the same time, or that another application is not already using this hotkey.
data.comment: Detailed error message when global hotkey registration fails. {0} is the attempted hotkey.

data.name: Err_Title
data.comment: Title text for error dialogs.

data.name: Err_TouchKeyboardNotFound
data.comment: Error message when the system touch keyboard cannot be launched.

data.name: Menu_CaptureKey
data.comment: Context menu item to start capturing a new wake-up key.

data.name: Menu_CaptureKey_Desc
data.value: Start capturing a new key from the keyboard.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the capture key menu item.

data.name: Menu_ClearHistory
data.comment: Context menu item to empty input history.

data.name: Menu_ClearHistory_Desc
data.value: Permanently clear all input records currently in memory.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the clear history menu item.

data.name: Menu_HotkeySettings
data.comment: Submenu name for hotkey related configurations.

data.name: Menu_HotkeySettings_Desc
data.value: Configure global hotkeys that open InputBox.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the hotkey settings submenu.

data.name: Menu_PrivacyMode
data.comment: Context menu item to toggle privacy mode.

data.name: Menu_PrivacyMode_Desc
data.value: When enabled, new inputs will not be saved to history.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the privacy mode menu item.

data.name: Mod_Alt
data.comment: Display name for the Alt modifier key in settings.

data.name: Mod_Ctrl
data.comment: Display name for the Ctrl modifier key in settings.

data.name: Mod_Shift
data.comment: Display name for the Shift modifier key in settings.

data.name: Mod_Win
data.comment: Display name for the Windows logo modifier key in settings.

data.name: Msg_Copied
data.comment: Temporary status text shown on button after successful copy.

data.name: Msg_CopyFail
data.comment: Status text shown on button when copy fails.

data.name: Msg_HotkeyUpdated
data.comment: Status message shown when hotkey is successfully updated.

data.name: Msg_InputCleared
data.comment: Status message shown when input box is cleared.

data.name: Msg_ConfirmDeletePhrase
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the phrase "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.
data.comment: Confirmation message shown before deleting a phrase. {0} = phrase name.

data.name: Msg_PressAnyKey
data.comment: Prompt asking users to press a key in capture mode.

data.name: Pht_TBInput
data.comment: Hint text (placeholder) shown when the input box is empty.

data.name: Wrn_Title
data.comment: Title text for warning dialogs.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Connected
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a controller connection is detected. {0} is index or name.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Disconnected
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a controller is disconnected. {0} is index or name.

data.name: A11y_Delete_Multiple
data.comment: Accessibility message played when multiple characters are deleted at once. {0} is the count.

data.name: A11y_New_Line
data.comment: Accessibility message played when a new line is added to the input field.

data.name: Err_HotkeyRegFail_Brief
data.value: Hotkey registration failed. Reverted to previous setting.
data.comment: Short error message when hotkey registration fails and reverts.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Fallback
data.value: GameInput initialization failed. Switched to XInput compatibility mode.
data.comment: Accessibility message when GameInput is unavailable and auto-switches to XInput.

data.name: A11y_PrivacyMode_On
data.comment: Accessibility message when privacy mode is turned on.

data.name: A11y_PrivacyMode_Off
data.comment: Accessibility message when privacy mode is turned off.

data.name: A11y_History_Navigation
data.comment: Accessibility message for navigating history records. {0} is index, {1} is total, {2} is content.

data.name: A11y_Startup_Status
data.comment: Startup accessibility status summary. {0} is privacy status, {1} is current hotkey.

data.name: Menu_Settings
data.comment: Submenu name containing various advanced settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Window
data.comment: Context menu item for window and operation related settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Feedback
data.comment: Context menu item for vibration feedback settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Gamepad
data.comment: Context menu item for gamepad related settings.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Vibration
data.comment: Context menu item to toggle vibration on or off.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Intensity
data.comment: Context menu item showing and setting vibration intensity. {0} is percentage.

data.name: Menu_Settings_Provider
data.comment: Context menu item showing current gamepad input API info.

data.name: Menu_Settings_HistoryCapacity
data.comment: Context menu item showing and setting history capacity. {0} is current capacity.

data.name: Menu_Opacity_Adjust
data.comment: Context menu item to open the opacity adjustment dialog (child item of the Opacity submenu).

data.name: Menu_OpenDataFolder
data.comment: Context menu item for opening the app settings folder in AppData Roaming.

data.name: Menu_OpenDataFolder_Desc
data.value: Open the app settings folder in AppData Roaming.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Open Settings Folder menu item.

data.name: Menu_OpenLogFolder
data.comment: Context menu item for opening the application log folder in AppData Local.

data.name: Menu_OpenLogFolder_Desc
data.value: Open the log file folder in AppData Local.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Open Log Folder menu item.

data.name: Msg_FolderNotFound
data.value: The folder does not exist yet.
data.comment: Accessibility message when the target folder has not been created yet.

data.name: Settings_WindowRestoreDelay
data.comment: Setting name for delay when window is restored.

data.name: Settings_ClipboardRetryDelay
data.comment: Setting name for retry interval when clipboard is busy.

data.name: Settings_TouchKeyboardDismissDelay
data.comment: Setting name for delay when touch keyboard is closed.

data.name: Settings_WindowSwitchBufferBase
data.comment: Setting name for base buffer time when switching focus back to target window.

data.name: Settings_HistoryCapacity
data.comment: Setting name for max records in input history.

data.name: Settings_ThumbDeadzoneEnter
data.comment: Setting name for stick deadzone entry threshold.

data.name: Settings_ThumbDeadzoneExit
data.comment: Setting name for stick deadzone exit threshold.

data.name: Settings_RepeatDelay
data.comment: Setting name for repeat input delay on controllers.

data.name: Settings_RepeatSpeed
data.comment: Setting name for repeat input speed on controllers.

data.name: Menu_Gamepad_ResetCalibration
data.comment: Context-menu item that clears the runtime-learned neutral offset for the game controller.

data.name: Menu_Gamepad_ResetCalibration_Desc
data.value: Clear the runtime-learned neutral offset for the current game controller without changing the saved deadzone or repeat settings.
data.comment: Accessible description for the Reset Current Calibration State menu item.

data.name: Menu_Gamepad_CalibrationVisualizer
data.comment: Menu item label for opening the live controller calibration diagnostics dialog.

data.name: Menu_Gamepad_CalibrationVisualizer_Desc
data.value: Open a live diagnostics window that shows the raw point, corrected point, and current deadzone for the controller sticks.
data.comment: Accessible description for the Calibration Visualizer menu item.

data.name: Dialog_GamepadCalibrationVisualizer_Title
data.comment: Title of the controller calibration diagnostics dialog.

data.name: Dialog_GamepadCalibrationVisualizer_Desc
data.value: Left plot = LS, right plot = RS. Hollow diamond = raw input, blue dot = corrected position, solid ring = deadzone entry threshold, dashed ring = exit threshold.
data.comment: Description text shown at the top of the controller calibration diagnostics dialog.

data.name: Dialog_GamepadCalibrationVisualizer_CanvasName
data.value: Left and right stick calibration plots
data.comment: Accessible name for the controller stick calibration drawing area.

data.name: Dialog_GamepadCalibrationVisualizer_Canvas_Desc
data.value: Live plot for both controller sticks. The hollow diamond shows raw input, the solid dot shows the corrected position, the solid ring shows the deadzone entry threshold, and the dashed ring shows the exit threshold, so the meaning does not rely on color alone.
data.comment: Accessible description for the controller stick calibration drawing area.

data.name: Dialog_GamepadCalibrationVisualizer_StatusConnected
data.comment: Status text shown when a controller is connected. {0}-{7} are normalized axis values for LS and RS, and {8}-{9} are deadzone thresholds.

data.name: Dialog_GamepadCalibrationVisualizer_StatusDisconnected
data.value: No controller connected. Reconnect and move either stick to inspect drift, centering, and correction.
data.comment: Status text shown in the calibration visualizer when no controller is connected.

data.name: Menu_Gamepad_IdentifyController
data.comment: Menu item label for playing a distinct vibration on the active controller.

data.name: Menu_Gamepad_IdentifyController_Desc
data.value: Play a distinct vibration on the active controller so you can find it quickly.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the identify controller menu item.

data.name: Msg_RestartRequired
data.value: This change requires a restart to take effect. Restart now?
data.comment: Prompt message informing users that a restart is required for settings to apply.

data.name: Msg_EnterValue
data.value: Please enter a new value for {0}:
data.comment: Prompt text for numeric input dialogs. {0} is the item name.

data.name: Btn_OK
data.comment: OK button text in dialog boxes.

data.name: Btn_Cancel
data.comment: Cancel button text in dialog boxes.

data.name: Btn_SetDefault
data.comment: Reset to default button text in dialog boxes.

data.name: Settings_VibrationIntensity
data.comment: Setting name for vibration intensity adjustment.

data.name: A11y_Menu_NumericDesc
data.comment: Accessibility template for numeric menu items. {0} is name, {1} is current, {2} is min, {3} is max.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Toggle_Desc
data.value: Toggle {0} as a modifier for the wake up hotkey.
data.comment: Accessibility description for modifier toggles. {0} is modifier name.

data.name: A11y_Value_Max
data.comment: Accessibility announcement when the numeric input reaches its upper limit.

data.name: A11y_Value_Min
data.comment: Accessibility announcement when the numeric input reaches its lower limit.

data.name: A11y_Value_Range_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for numeric input fields including range info. {0} is current, {1} is min, {2} is max.

data.name: A11y_Btn_OK_Desc
data.value: Confirm and apply the current value.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the OK button.

data.name: A11y_Btn_Cancel_Desc
data.value: Cancel changes and close the dialog.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Cancel button.

data.name: A11y_Btn_SetDefault_Desc
data.value: Reset the value to the factory default: {0}.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Reset button. {0} is the factory default value.

data.name: A11y_Btn_SetDefault_Group_Desc
data.value: Reset all settings in this group to their factory defaults.
data.comment: Accessibility description for Reset buttons that reset multiple settings at once (e.g., window ops, feedback, gamepad).

data.name: A11y_Grid_Numeric_Desc
data.value: Contains the numeric input field and increment/decrement buttons.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the numeric input grid container in NumericInputDialog.

data.name: A11y_Mod_On
data.comment: Accessibility message when a modifier key is turned on. {0} is the name.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Off
data.comment: Accessibility message when a modifier key is turned off. {0} is the name.

data.name: A11y_Mod_Key_Missing
data.comment: Accessibility message reminding users that the main hotkey is not yet set.

data.name: A11y_Clipboard_Retrying
data.comment: Accessibility message when clipboard is occupied and auto-retrying.

data.name: A11y_Cancelled
data.comment: Accessibility message when a general operation is cancelled.

data.name: A11y_Checked
data.comment: Accessibility status for checked menu items.

data.name: A11y_Unchecked
data.comment: Accessibility status for unchecked menu items.

data.name: A11y_Opening_Keyboard
data.comment: Accessibility message when launching the touch keyboard.

data.name: App_Privacy_Suffix
data.comment: Icon marker appended to window title when privacy mode is on.

data.name: App_Gamepad_Suffix
data.comment: Controller info shown in window title. {0} is controller name.

data.name: App_Gamepad_XInput_Format
data.comment: Name format for XInput devices. {0} is controller index.

data.name: A11y_Background_Error
data.comment: Accessibility message reporting background worker errors. {0} is detailed error info.

data.name: A11y_ButtonArea
data.comment: Accessibility group label name for the main action buttons area.

data.name: Menu_Exit
data.comment: Context menu item to close and end the application.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Settings_Desc
data.value: Open advanced settings including window behavior, feedback, and gamepad options.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Settings menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_WinOps_Desc
data.value: Configure window restore delays and clipboard retry settings.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Window & Operations menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Feedback_Desc
data.value: Configure vibration feedback and intensity levels.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Feedback settings menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Gamepad_Desc
data.value: Configure controller deadzones, repeat speed, API provider, and reset the current calibration state.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Gamepad settings menu.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Gamepad_DeadzoneEnter_Hint
data.value: Raise this if the game controller drifts on its own.
data.comment: Hint for the deadzone enter threshold item.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Gamepad_DeadzoneExit_Hint
data.value: Keep this lower than the trigger threshold to reduce jitter when returning to center.
data.comment: Hint for the deadzone exit threshold item.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Gamepad_RepeatDelay_Hint
data.value: Controls how long to wait before a held direction starts repeating.
data.comment: Hint for the repeat delay item.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Gamepad_RepeatSpeed_Hint
data.value: Controls how fast held directions repeat after the initial delay.
data.comment: Hint for the repeat speed item.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_CalibrationReset
data.value: Current game controller calibration state reset.
data.comment: Announcement played after resetting the runtime calibration state.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_CalibrationVisualizer_Open
data.comment: Accessibility announcement played when the controller calibration visualizer dialog opens.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_ExitHoldStart
data.value: Hold LB + RB + X for 0.8 seconds to exit.
data.comment: Accessibility guidance announced when the user begins the guarded exit shortcut.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_IdentifyStarted
data.comment: Announced before playing the identify vibration on the active controller. {0} is the controller name.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_IdentifyUnavailable
data.value: No active controller is available to identify.
data.comment: Announced when the user requests controller identification but no active controller is connected.

data.name: A11y_Menu_VibEnable_Desc
data.value: Toggle all controller vibration effects on or off.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the vibration toggle item.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Provider_Desc
data.value: Select the underlying API for controller input (GameInput or XInput).
data.comment: Accessibility description for the API provider item.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Provider_GameInput_Desc
data.value: Use Microsoft's modern GameInput API. Recommended for modern controllers.
data.comment: Accessibility description for GameInput provider option.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Provider_XInput_Desc
data.value: Use legacy XInput API. Best for compatibility with older devices.
data.comment: Accessibility description for XInput provider option.

data.name: A11y_Settings_RestartRequired
data.comment: Suffix added to accessibility descriptions for settings that require an app restart.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Exit_Desc
data.value: Quit the application and release all resources.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Exit menu item.

data.name: A11y_TargetWindowLost
data.value: Cannot return: The target window has been closed.
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt when user tries to return to a non-existent target window.

data.name: A11y_SkipNav_JumpToInput
data.comment: Announced when Ctrl+M is pressed to jump to the main text input field (WCAG 2.4.1 skip navigation).

data.name: A11y_SnapBack
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when the window is snapped back from off-screen.

data.name: Settings_WindowOpacity
data.comment: Setting item name for window transparency level.

data.name: A11y_Menu_OpacityDesc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the opacity menu item. {0} is label, {1} is percentage.

data.name: A11y_Opacity_Changed
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when opacity changes. {0} is percentage.

data.name: A11y_Opacity_HighContrast
data.value: High Contrast mode is on, opacity locked to 100%.
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when opacity is forced to 100% due to High Contrast.

data.name: Msg_LowOpacity_Warn
data.value:
Setting opacity below 50% may reduce readability when the background is complex. In High Contrast mode, InputBox always overrides this to 100%.
Continue?
data.comment: Warning dialog body shown when user sets opacity below 50%. Informs the user of potential readability impact and that High Contrast mode overrides this setting.

data.name: Msg_LowOpacity_Warn_Title
data.comment: Title of the warning dialog shown when opacity is set below 50%.

data.name: Err_GamepadInitFail
data.value: Gamepad controller initialization failed. Some features may be unavailable.
data.comment: Error message played via A11y when the gamepad controller fails to initialize at startup.

data.name: Menu_ApplyThemeRestart
data.comment: Menu item shown when an app setting change is pending and the user can immediately restart the application.

data.name: Menu_ApplySystemChangesRestart
data.comment: Menu item shown when a system setting change is pending and the user can restart to fully apply it.

data.name: Menu_ApplyAllChangesRestart
data.comment: Menu item shown when both app and system changes are pending and the user can restart to apply everything.

data.name: A11y_Restart_AllChanges_Desc
data.value: There are pending app and system changes. Restart the application now to fully apply everything.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the restart item when both app settings and system changes are pending.

data.name: A11y_Theme_Changed_Hint
data.value: A system change that requires a restart is pending. Please select "Apply System Changes and Restart" from the context menu to fully apply the update.
data.comment: Accessibility voice prompt played when a system change is pending and the user can restart the application from the context menu to fully apply it.

data.name: App_ThemePending_Suffix
data.comment: Icon marker displayed in the title bar when a system theme change is detected but the application hasn't been restarted yet.

data.name: A11y_Menu_Submenu_Enter
data.comment: Announce when entering a submenu using gamepad

data.name: A11y_Menu_Submenu_Exit
data.comment: Announce when exiting a submenu using gamepad

data.name: Menu_A11yInterrupt
data.comment: Context menu item that toggles whether screen reader announcements can interrupt the previous one (WCAG 2.2.4).

data.name: Menu_A11yInterrupt_Desc
data.value: Allow announcements to interrupt the previous one. Disable to hear every message in full.
data.comment: Accessible description for the interrupt announcements toggle menu item.

data.name: A11y_A11yInterrupt_On
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when the interrupt-announcements setting is turned on.

data.name: A11y_A11yInterrupt_Off
data.value: Interrupt announcements disabled. All messages will be announced in full.
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when the interrupt-announcements setting is turned off.

data.name: Menu_AnimatedVisualAlerts
data.comment: Context menu item that toggles animated visual alerts for warnings and validation states.

data.name: Menu_AnimatedVisualAlerts_Desc
data.value: Allow 1 hertz animated visual alerts. Disable to use a single static pulse, which is safer for light-sensitive users.
data.comment: Accessible description for the animated visual alerts toggle menu item.

data.name: A11y_AnimatedVisualAlerts_On
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when animated visual alerts are enabled.

data.name: A11y_AnimatedVisualAlerts_Off
data.value: Animated visual alerts disabled. Warnings will use a single static pulse.
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when animated visual alerts are disabled.

data.name: Menu_MinimizeOnReturn
data.comment: Context menu item that toggles whether InputBox minimizes itself when returning to the previous window.

data.name: Menu_MinimizeOnReturn_Desc
data.value: Minimize InputBox when returning to the previous window.
data.comment: Accessible description for the minimize-on-return toggle menu item.

data.name: A11y_MinimizeOnReturn_On
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when the minimize-on-return setting is turned on.

data.name: A11y_MinimizeOnReturn_Off
data.comment: Screen reader announcement played when the minimize-on-return setting is turned off.

data.name: Msg_MinimizeOnReturn_Confirm
data.value: InputBox will minimize itself when you return to the previous window. Do you want to enable this feature?
data.comment: Confirmation dialog body shown when the user attempts to enable the minimize-on-return feature.

data.name: Msg_MinimizeOnReturn_Confirm_Title
data.comment: Title of the confirmation dialog shown when enabling minimize-on-return.

data.name: Menu_Help
data.comment: Context menu item that opens the help dialog (WCAG 3.3.5).

data.name: Menu_Help_Desc
data.value: Show keyboard shortcuts and gamepad controls (F1)
data.comment: Accessible description for the Help menu item.

data.name: Help_Title
data.comment: Title bar text of the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_A11y_Dialog_Desc
data.value: Shows keyboard shortcuts and gamepad controls. Use arrow keys, Page Up, Page Down, or the gamepad to scroll, then choose Close to return.
data.comment: Accessible description for the Help dialog itself.

data.name: Help_Section_Keyboard
data.comment: Section heading inside the Help dialog for the keyboard shortcut table.

data.name: Help_Section_Gamepad
data.comment: Section heading inside the Help dialog for the gamepad controls table.

data.name: Help_Col_Key
data.comment: Column header for the key/button column in the keyboard shortcut table inside the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Col_Button
data.comment: Column header for the button column in the gamepad controls table inside the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Col_Action
data.comment: Column header for the action description column in both tables inside the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Btn_Close
data.comment: Label for the Close button in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_A11y_Keyboard_Group
data.comment: Accessible name for the keyboard shortcuts section container in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_A11y_Keyboard_Group_Desc
data.value: Lists the available keyboard shortcuts and their actions.
data.comment: Accessible description for the keyboard shortcuts section container in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_A11y_Gamepad_Group
data.comment: Accessible name for the gamepad controls section container in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_A11y_Gamepad_Group_Desc
data.value: Lists the available gamepad buttons and their actions.
data.comment: Accessible description for the gamepad controls section container in the Help dialog.

data.name: Help_Keyboard_Rows
data.value: Esc Clear input / Return to previous window (if empty) Enter Copy to clipboard and return (or open OSK) Alt + A Same as Enter Shift + Enter Insert a new line F1 Open this Help dialog ↑ / ↓ Navigate history ← / → Move cursor left / right Shift + ← / → Select text Home / End Jump cursor to line start / end Ctrl + ← / → Move cursor by word Backspace Delete previous character or selection Delete Delete next character Alt + B Return to previous window without copying Alt + ↑ / ↓ Increase / decrease opacity (±5%) Alt + 0 Reset window opacity (100%) Alt + P Toggle privacy mode F10 / Alt + M Open feature menu Ctrl + M Jump to text input {0} Show / hide Input Box (global)
data.comment: Tab-separated rows for the keyboard shortcut table in the Help dialog. Format: Key{tab}Action. One row per line.

data.name: Help_Gamepad_Rows
data.value: A / Start Confirm & Return / Start or Menu opens OSK B Clear input text LB + RB + B Quick return to previous window Back / View (release) Return to previous window Y Open feature menu X Backspace (Delete character/selection) Hold LB + RB + X Exit application Back / View + X Reset window opacity ↑ / ↓ Navigate history ← / → Move cursor left / right LB / RB (tap / hold) Page history up / down by 5 entries; hold to repeat LB / RB + ← / → Jump cursor by word LT / RT Jump to text start / end LT + RT Toggle Privacy Mode Phrases submenu: LB / RB Switch to previous / next page (hold to repeat) Phrases submenu: LT / RT Jump to first / last page Phrase Manager: LB / RB Select previous / next phrase Phrase Manager: LT / RT Jump to first / last phrase RS ← / → Expand or shrink selection Back / View + ↑ / ↓ Adjust window opacity (±5%)
data.comment: Tab-separated rows for the gamepad controls table in the Help dialog. Format: Button{tab}Action. One row per line.

data.name: A11y_ContextMenu_Name
data.comment: Accessibility name for the main context menu strip.

data.name: A11y_ContextMenu_Desc
data.value: Contains privacy mode, hotkey settings, advanced settings, and other application functions.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the main context menu strip.

data.name: Menu_Phrases
data.comment: Context menu item label for the phrases submenu.

data.name: Menu_ManagePhrases
data.comment: Context menu item to open the phrase management dialog.

data.name: Menu_ExportPhrases
data.comment: Context menu item to export all phrases to a user-selected JSON file.

data.name: Menu_ImportPhrases
data.comment: Context menu item to import phrases from a user-selected JSON file, replacing the current list.

data.name: Msg_ImportPhrases_Confirm
data.value: Importing will replace all {0} existing phrase(s). Continue?
data.comment: Confirmation message before importing phrases. {0} = current phrase count.

data.name: Msg_ImportPhrases_Success
data.comment: Success message after importing phrases. {0} = number of phrases imported.

data.name: Msg_ImportPhrases_Error
data.value: Failed to import phrases. The file may be invalid or corrupted.
data.comment: Error message when importing phrases fails due to an invalid or unreadable file.

data.name: Msg_ImportPhrases_Error_Persist
data.value: Failed to save imported phrases to disk. The previous phrases have been restored.
data.comment: Error message when the import succeeded in memory but could not be persisted. Data is reverted.

data.name: Msg_ExportPhrases_Success
data.comment: Success message after exporting phrases. {0} = number of phrases exported.

data.name: Msg_ExportPhrases_Error
data.value: Failed to export phrases. Please check the destination path and try again.
data.comment: Error message when exporting phrases fails.

data.name: Msg_ExportPhrases_Empty
data.value: There are no phrases to export. Please add phrases first.
data.comment: Warning message when the user tries to export but the phrase list is empty.

data.name: A11y_Phrases_Exported
data.comment: Screen reader announcement after successfully exporting phrases. {0} = count.

data.name: A11y_Phrases_Imported
data.comment: Screen reader announcement after successfully importing phrases. {0} = count.

data.name: Menu_PhraseEmpty
data.comment: Displayed in the phrases submenu when no phrases exist.

data.name: Phrase_Title
data.comment: Title of the phrase management dialog.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_Add
data.comment: Button label: add a new phrase.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_Edit
data.comment: Button label: edit the selected phrase.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_Delete
data.comment: Button label: delete the selected phrase.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_MoveUp
data.comment: Button label: move the selected phrase up.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_MoveDown
data.comment: Button label: move the selected phrase down.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_Close
data.comment: Button label: close the phrase management dialog.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_Confirm
data.comment: Button label: confirm phrase edit.

data.name: Phrase_Btn_Cancel
data.comment: Button label: cancel phrase edit.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Title_Add
data.comment: Title of the phrase edit dialog when adding a new phrase.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Title_Edit
data.comment: Title of the phrase edit dialog when editing an existing phrase.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Name
data.comment: Label for the phrase name input field.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Name_Count
data.comment: Prefix shown before the current and maximum name character count in the phrase edit dialog, including locale-appropriate punctuation.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Content
data.comment: Label for the phrase content input field.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Content_Count
data.comment: Prefix shown before the current and maximum content character count in the phrase edit dialog, including locale-appropriate punctuation.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Dialog_Desc
data.value: Manage phrases: add, edit, delete, and reorder. Use gamepad Y to add, A to insert, X to delete, Left/Right to reorder.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the phrase management dialog.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_List_Name
data.comment: Accessibility name for the phrase list box.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_List_Desc
data.value: Select a phrase and press Enter or gamepad A to insert it into the input box.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the phrase list box.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_ButtonArea
data.comment: Accessibility name for the phrase action button area.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_ButtonArea_Desc
data.value: Contains action buttons for phrase operations.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the phrase action button area grouping container.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Page_Previous
data.comment: Accessibility name for phrase submenu pagination previous button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Page_Next
data.comment: Accessibility name for phrase submenu pagination next button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Page_Info
data.comment: Accessibility name for phrase submenu pagination info item. {0} = current page, {1} = total pages.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Page_Shortcuts
data.value: Use LB and RB to switch pages quickly, and LT and RT to jump to the first or last page.
data.comment: Shortcut hint announced when the phrases submenu opens with multiple pages.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_Add_Desc
data.value: Add a new phrase. Gamepad: Y button.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Add button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_Edit_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Edit button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_Delete_Desc
data.value: Delete the selected phrase. Gamepad: X button.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Delete button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_MoveUp_Desc
data.value: Move the selected phrase up. Gamepad: Left D-pad.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Move Up button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_MoveDown_Desc
data.value: Move the selected phrase down. Gamepad: Right D-pad.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Move Down button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_Close_Desc
data.value: Close the phrase manager. Gamepad: B button.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Close button.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_Confirm_Desc
data.value: Confirm and save the phrase. Gamepad: A button.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the OK button in the edit dialog.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Btn_Cancel_Desc
data.comment: Accessibility description for the Cancel button in the edit dialog.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Edit_Dialog_Desc
data.value: Enter a name and content for the phrase. Press Enter or gamepad A to confirm.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the phrase edit dialog.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Edit_Name_Desc
data.value: Enter a display name for this phrase (max 50 characters).
data.comment: Accessibility description for the phrase name text box.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Edit_Content_Desc
data.value: Enter the text content to be inserted (max 500 characters). Supports multiple lines.
data.comment: Accessibility description for the phrase content text box.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Selected
data.comment: A11y announcement when a phrase is selected in the list. {0} = phrase name.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Added
data.comment: A11y announcement after a phrase is added. {0} = phrase name.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Updated
data.comment: A11y announcement after a phrase is updated. {0} = phrase name.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Deleted
data.comment: A11y announcement after a phrase is deleted. {0} = phrase name.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Moved
data.comment: A11y announcement after a phrase is reordered. {0} = new 1-based position.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Full
data.value: Phrase list is full. Cannot add more phrases.
data.comment: A11y announcement when the phrase list has reached maximum capacity.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Inserted
data.comment: A11y announcement when a phrase is inserted into the input box. {0} = phrase name.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Selected_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe A11y announcement when selecting a phrase item.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Added_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe A11y announcement after adding a phrase.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Updated_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe A11y announcement after updating a phrase.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Deleted_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe A11y announcement after deleting a phrase.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_Inserted_PrivacySafe
data.comment: Privacy-safe A11y announcement when inserting a phrase into the input box.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_NameRequired
data.comment: A11y announcement when the user tries to confirm without entering a name.

data.name: Phrase_A11y_ContentRequired
data.comment: A11y announcement when the user tries to confirm without entering content.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Name_Placeholder
data.comment: Placeholder text for phrase name input in phrase edit dialog.

data.name: Phrase_Edit_Content_Placeholder
data.comment: Placeholder text for phrase content input in phrase edit dialog.

data.name: Btn_Yes
data.comment: Label for the Yes button in GamepadMessageBox.

data.name: Btn_No
data.comment: Label for the No button in GamepadMessageBox.

data.name: Btn_Abort
data.comment: Label for the Abort button in GamepadMessageBox (AbortRetryIgnore set).

data.name: Btn_Retry
data.comment: Label for the Retry button in GamepadMessageBox (RetryCancel / AbortRetryIgnore set).

data.name: Btn_Ignore
data.comment: Label for the Ignore button in GamepadMessageBox (AbortRetryIgnore set).

data.name: GmBox_A11y_Icon_Error
data.comment: Accessible label for the error icon in GamepadMessageBox. Prepended to AccessibleDescription when MessageBoxIcon.Error is shown.

data.name: GmBox_A11y_Icon_Warning
data.comment: Accessible label for the warning icon in GamepadMessageBox. Prepended to AccessibleDescription when MessageBoxIcon.Warning is shown.

data.name: GmBox_A11y_Icon_Information
data.comment: Accessible label for the information icon in GamepadMessageBox. Prepended to AccessibleDescription when MessageBoxIcon.Information is shown.

data.name: GmBox_A11y_Icon_Question
data.comment: Accessible label for the question icon in GamepadMessageBox. Prepended to AccessibleDescription when MessageBoxIcon.Question is shown.

data.name: GmBox_A11y_Dialog_Desc
data.value: Message dialog. Use the hints below.
data.comment: Accessible description for GamepadMessageBox. Announced by screen readers when the dialog opens.

data.name: GmBox_A11y_Hint
data.comment: Gamepad hint label in GamepadMessageBox. {0} = primary action hint text, {1} = cancel action hint text.

data.name: A11y_Gamepad_Profile_Applied
data.comment: Accessibility announcement confirming the active controller face-button layout. {0} is the layout name such as Xbox or PlayStation.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonLayout
data.comment: Label for the controller settings submenu that selects the face-button layout style.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonLayout_Current_Auto
data.comment: Status summary for the active face-button layout when automatic detection is being used. {0} is the effective layout name and {1} is the Auto label.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonLayout_Current_Manual
data.comment: Status summary for the active face-button layout when the user manually selected a specific mode. {0} is the effective layout name.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonLayout_TitleWithStatus
data.comment: Submenu title format showing the face-button layout title plus the current effective layout name. {0} is the submenu title and {1} is the effective layout.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonMode_Auto
data.comment: Face-button layout mode label that automatically detects the controller style when possible.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonMode_Xbox
data.comment: Face-button layout mode label for Xbox-style confirm and cancel mapping.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonMode_PlayStation
data.comment: Face-button layout mode label for the PlayStation circle-confirm mapping.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonMode_PlayStationCrossConfirm
data.comment: Face-button layout mode label for the PlayStation cross-confirm mapping.

data.name: Settings_GamepadFaceButtonMode_Nintendo
data.comment: Face-button layout mode label for Nintendo-style face-button labeling.
